content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
emu guqu tutafi jimeofi bi elhexeme aliyakiyame yabure jakade tuttu jime goidaha
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the provided Manchu sentence to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it has a rich written history. Here is my translation based on the knowledge available:

### We will hunt deer and wild boar, and we will also hunt other animals. ###

Please note that translating from Manchu can be challenging due to the language's complex grammar and the limited availability of modern resources. This translation is an approximation based on the words and structures I recognize.
